name: Cherry Date Skillet Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-inch skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Stir in the sugar and dates; remove from heat. Stir in the egg.
3. Return to the heat; continue cooking over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a full boil.
4. Boil, stirring constantly, for 1 minute; then remove from heat.
5. Stir in rice cereal, coconut flakes, cherries, and vanilla extract until moistened.
6. Let stand for 10 minutes.
7. Shape rounded teaspoonfuls of dough into 1-inch balls.
8. Roll each ball in the remaining coconut.
